pi_items.source: O*NET Online (onetonline.org) - verified that 13-1041.00 is the official ONET SOC code for Compliance Officers
O*NET Online (https://www.onetonline.org/link/summary/13-1041.00) - confirmed as the official ONET SOC code for Compliance Officers occupation

PCI Security Standards Council and multiple compliance sources confirm PCI-DSS applies to retail and e-commerce entities processing payment card data. Task describes a company processing $2.3 billion in annual card transactions, fitting Level 1 merchant classification (>6M transactions/year)

Web search found multiple real ShopStream companies (ShopStream Limited UK, ShopStream LLC California, Emplifi ShopStream, ShopStream affiliate marketing platform) but none match the fictional 'ShopStream Inc.' e-commerce retailer described in the task processing $2.3B in credit card transactions annually

privileged_info_summary: The task is a PCI-DSS compliance remediation scenario for a fictional e-commerce organization. Verified metadata: occupation code 13-1041.00 (Compliance Officers) is the correct ONET SOC classification; Retail/E-commerce industry is appropriate for organizations handling payment card data under PCI-DSS standards. The organization 'ShopStream Inc.' appears to be a fictional entity created for the training scenario, as no real organization with this exact name and description (fast-growing e-commerce retailer processing $2.3B in annual card transactions) could be verified. Data is synthetic: the task operates on simulated Eramba GRC software records with fictional compliance audit findings (6 PCI-DSS requirements with varying severity levels) requiring simulated remediation within the Eramba system.
